prompt: I need a SvelteKit page that loads a list of blog posts from a database in +page.server.ts, has form actions for creating and deleting posts, and uses progressive enhancement. Also write a test for the load function.

assertions.text: Has a +page.server.ts with a typed load function (PageServerLoad)
Has named form actions (e.g. create, delete) in the actions export
Uses fail() from @sveltejs/kit for validation errors
Has a +page.svelte that uses use:enhance for progressive enhancement
Uses Svelte 5 syntax ($props, onclick) not Svelte 4 (export let, on:click)
Test file imports from vitest and tests the load function
Test file uses .test.ts extension (not .svelte.test.ts) for server-side code
